channel.title: Nishchay Kaushik | Engineering Leader & Full-Stack Engineer
channel.description: Engineering Leader and Full-Stack Generalist specializing in AI-driven development. Actively leveraging latest LLMs and generative AI models (text, image, audio) to build and plan features at scale. Expertise in TypeScript, React, Node.js, Go, and Kubernetes.

item.title: Securing My Homelab: Integrating CrowdSec, Traefik, and Ntfy in Docker
item.description: Learn how to secure your self-hosted homelab using CrowdSec, Traefik v3, and Docker. Configure real-time bans, AppSec WAF, and instant push notifications via Ntfy.
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: How to Stop Vibe Coding and Start Using Structured AI Specs
item.description: Stop vibe coding. Learn how Spec-Driven Development (SDD) using OpenSpec, GitHub Spec-Kit, and Obra Superpowers prevents AI code drift and reduces token costs.
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: How to Automate Dynamic Social Images Using Satori and Sharp
item.description: Learn how to automatically generate beautiful, dynamic social media Open Graph (OG) images at build time using Vercel's Satori and Sharp. Step-by-step setup.
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: Running Gemma 4 Locally on iOS and Android: The Google AI Edge Gallery Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to running Gemma 4 locally on iPhone or Android via the Google AI Edge Gallery. Discover how Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) and MCP servers unlock on-device agents.
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: How to Install and Run Ollama in Termux on Android (2026 Guide)
item.description: Learn how to install Ollama in Termux on Android to run Large Language Models (LLMs) like Qwen, Llama, and Gemma locally. 100% free, private & offline.
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: Automating My Social Cards: Satori, Sharp, and the End of Generic Previews
item.description: Learn how to generate dynamic, rich Open Graph images with Satori and Sharp for your content. Move beyond generic images & automate your social cards
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: Top 4 ways to Run LLM locally on Android and iOS
item.description: Stop paying for AI subscriptions and regain your privacy. Learn the top 4 ways to run Large Language Models (LLMs) like Llama, Gemma, and Qwen locally.
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: Replace Google Photos: Self‑Host Immich in 2026
item.description: A step-by-step tutorial on setting up Immich with Docker, Cloudflare, and Tailscale. Secure your photos without the recurring cloud costs.
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: Getting Started with Self-Hosting in 2026
item.description: Start your self-hosting journey in 2026. Learn how to choose the right hardware, configure Debian 13, and deploy Docker containers for your homelab.
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: AdGuard Home: Stop Ads & Trackers for Your Entire Family
item.description: Learn how to configure AdGuard Home. Protect your family from ads, trackers, and malware with the best recommended DNS blocklists in 2026.
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: Self‑Hosting on a Budget: What I Run on My Mini PC
item.description: How I built a budget mini PC homelab running 35+ Docker services and replaced Google Photos and run AdGuard, Immich, Jellyfin & Outline Wiki,
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: Running 24/7 Local AI on an Old Android without Overheating
item.description: Learn how to run local AI models 24/7 on an old Android phone without overheating using Advanced Charging Control (ACC) and llama-server.
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: How to Run LLM Models on Old Android Devices Locally
item.description: Compile and run llama.cpp natively in Termux on old Android hardware. Learn how to run GGUF models locally with minimal RAM.
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: Hello World!
item.description: Insights from Nishchay on AI, self-hosting, performance testing, frontend tech, and cloud services
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: Exploring the Power of Web Browsers in 2020
item.description: Explore web browsers' features: screen-sharing via WebRTC and real-time communication solutions. Discover browser technology today!
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik

item.title: Building Your Own GitHub-Like Platform Using Golang
item.description: Learn how to build your own GitHub-like platform using Golang, exploring various tools and technologies to implement basic git operations
item.author: Nishchay Kaushik
